goal: Support concurrent EEG uploads, preprocessing jobs, statistics jobs, report rendering, and publication package generation without letting one tenant or one dataset overload the platform.

upload.api_role: sign multipart URLs and record metadata only

metadata.bottleneck_to_avoid: synchronous BIDS validation on request thread

analysis.path: queue -> CPU/GPU workers -> object storage derivatives
analysis.bottleneck_to_avoid: running MNE/EEGLAB jobs inside web API processes

figures_reports.bottleneck_to_avoid: large image/PDF generation during page requests

core_components: API gateway with auth, tenant routing, and global rate limits
Redis cluster for short-lived sessions, upload progress, queue locks, and rate counters
PostgreSQL primary plus read replicas for durable metadata and audit logs
S3-compatible object storage for raw files, derivatives, figures, and reports
Queue broker with separate queues for preflight, QC, preprocessing, statistics, rendering, and cleanup
Optional GPU worker pools for deep learning or heavy source/localization workflows
Autoscaler based on queue depth, job age, CPU, memory, and object storage throughput
Observability stack for latency, queue time, upload retries, storage I/O, and per-tenant usage

isolation: Priority queues for interactive previews vs long batch jobs

autoscaling_policy.api_replicas: scale by p95 latency, CPU, and request rate
autoscaling_policy.upload_signer: scale by signed-part RPS and Redis latency
autoscaling_policy.analysis_workers: scale by queue depth, oldest job age, and average job duration
autoscaling_policy.scale_down: drain workers gracefully; never terminate a running MNE job without checkpoint or retry record

resilience: Use idempotency keys for upload complete and task creation.
Store every task input/output manifest in object storage and PostgreSQL.
Use at-least-once queue semantics plus idempotent workers.
Backpressure long jobs instead of slowing down upload preflight.
Circuit-break report rendering when object storage or database p95 latency crosses threshold.
Retry failed chunks and jobs separately; never restart a whole dataset upload after one chunk failure.
